summary: A Go-based test runner and schema validation tool with MCP integration and Goss migration capabilities, heavily augmented by AI-generated test suites.
concerns: High volume of auto-generated extra tests (GOrchestra/glm-agents) may bloat the codebase and reduce signal-to-noise ratio
Untracked files in git status indicate potential incomplete commits or ignored artifacts
Heavy reliance on generated tests could mask actual integration issues
suggestions: Consolidate or prune redundant auto-generated test files to maintain repository hygiene
Investigate the untracked file and commit or gitignore it appropriately
Focus on the core runner and MCP handler logic as they represent the primary business value
